articles.title: Week in Meme is Here 📰
articles.body:
This is where Trusty recaps what's happening across the chains — the pumps, the rugs, the narratives, and the takes that actually matter.

Every week we'll break down the biggest moves, who called them, who got rugged, and what you can learn from it. No shilling. No financial advice. Just the meta, explained.

If you spot something worth covering — a viral token, a clean rug, a wild CZ post — DM @Trusty_BNB and we'll feature it.
articles.takeaway: The market moves fast. Read this weekly to stay ahead of the narratives without scrolling X for 6 hours a day.
